text:
OpenAI 现在比 Anthropic 开放多了！

现在能在 Claude Code 里调用 Codex 帮你审查代码！

省得我来回复制了，还想自己写一个来着，没想到官方的就来了。

Open AI 出了一个官方插件，可以帮你在 Claude Code 里调用 Codex

总共支持 3 个命令：

/codex:review 运行标准的只读 Codex 审查。 https://t.co/SwVTOh7YDj

昨晚果子（Apple）在中国推送了 Apple Intelligence。

然后早上古尔曼（Mark Gurman）说是失误，本来不应该上线的，现在已经被下掉了。

但是很多人说，升级 iOS 26.4 以后依然可以更新和安装，而且这个功能没有被关闭，想要体验的可以试试。 https://t.co/jvPf9lUsBR
yeah

You’re probably overpaying for AI inference.

Researchers just proved a small model with the right scaffolding crushes a model 50x its size on long-context tasks.

Read this thread and you’ll know how to get better results with fewer resources:

The problem: LLMs choke on long inputs.

The usual fix? Bigger context windows. More parameters. More RAM.

But there’s a deeper issue. When you let a model write its own recursive code to manage memory, 

you get infinite loops, broken outputs, and unpredictable costs.

Brute

λ-RLM flips the approach.
Instead of letting the model generate arbitrary code, it runs a typed functional runtime grounded in lambda calculus.

Think: a fixed library of pre-verified operations (SPLIT, MAP, REDUCE). 

The model only handles small, bounded leaf problems.

The results across 9 models and 4 long-context tasks:

→ Outperformed standard recursive models in 29 of 36 comparisons

→ +21.9 accuracy points on weaker model tiers

→ Up to 4.1x faster

→ 8B model matched 70B performance while being 3.1x quicker

Small model + good

Why lambda calculus and not just “a Python script”?

Because Python can’t prove your code terminates on all inputs. Can’t give you a closed-form cost bound. 

Can’t guarantee accuracy scales predictably with recursion depth.
Lambda calculus isn’t the implementation. It’s the

The takeaway for builders:
The future of reliable AI isn’t just bigger parameters.

It’s giving models structured, verifiable environments to reason in. 

Typed control flow > open-ended code generation.

Paper: https://t.co/XTktu17i3P
Code: https://t.co/aSUftizxh9
https://t.co/LXq3siyyWc

most people read self-help books that expire in 6 months.

these 5 “banned” books have been relevant for 50+ years:

• The Gulag Archipelago
• 1984
• Brave New World
• The Sovereign Individual
• The Creature from Jekyll Island

they don’t teach you tactics. they teach you https://t.co/0e5406xBHm

here’s a prompt i use after finishing a heavy book:

“I just finished [book title] by [author]. Act as a world-class philosopher and critical thinker. 

Give me: 1) the 5 most dangerous ideas from this book that most readers miss, 2) how each idea applies to the modern world in

one prompt. five books. more clarity than most college courses.

try it with whatever you’re reading right now.

if this was useful, repost the first tweet so others find it too.

Computer use 功能现在登陆 Claude Code 

Claude Code现在能自己操控电脑了

以前 Claude Code 的写完代码交给你处理，

现在它可以在写代码、编译后，自己启动 App、点击 UI、找 bug、修复、验证，一句话 全搞定。

全程不用你动手。

SwiftUI、Electron这些没有 CLI 的 GUI 工具，也都支持。

Pro / https://t.co/e0QDSJuepY

These are great examples of Turntable in Illustrator that came out of beta today.

RT @icreatelife: We just released Turntable in Illustrator for everyone 🎉

You can rotate 2D vector art in 3D.
Place all frames on canvas.…

Claude Code 最近是真不当人。

很多人反馈自己的 Token 额度消耗翻了 5 到 10 倍，甚至 20 倍。

有个 Reddit 用户逆向了一下 Claude Code 的代码，发现有两个可能导致缓存失效的 bug。

这大概解释了为什么（Token 消耗）刚好是这个倍数，因为缓存了的 Token 比没缓存的 Token 大概便宜 10 到 20 https://t.co/457rGRqW4p
Claude Code 的自动审批模式已经在新版本中对企业用户和我们这些用三方 API 的用户开放了。

Claude Code 也能使用前几天 Anthropic 发布的 Computer Use 了

你可以用它这个能力来自己去验证一些 UI 上的问题：验证编码中的一些 UI 走查，模拟人工点击的链路测试

它也可以操作：
已经编译的 SwiftUI 应用
本地的、跨平台的应用
完全没有 CLI 的一些其他应用

Pro 和 Max 账号能用，三方的 API https://t.co/K4f1ll2qJW
https://t.co/HneY4CAY51

The fact that every scientific paper in 2026 is still uploaded only as fully formatted PDFs to academic archive sites that often limit downloads tells you everything you need to know about how quickly the scientific system is adjusting to the potential of AI to accelerate science
(I am doing the exact same thing, of course, because it is humans who judge my work and who I want to influence with my writing)
mdarxiv needs to exist.
RT @skooookum: AI is very good at writing code and dangerously mediocre at building software.

PSA in case you were not aware

Voice mode in ChatGPT and Claude are lobotomized models (4o and Haiku 4.5)

Do not trust the information you get in voice mode, use chat mode for anything where you need niche accuracy
This meeting could have been an email and this article could have been a tweet

兄弟们，有意思啊

OpenAI 发布了一个插件 

主动把自己把 Codex 塞进了 Claude Code 😅

该插件名为： codex-plugin-cc，让你在 Claude Code 里直接调用 Codex 做代码审查、对抗性审查，甚至把整个任务丢给 Codex 接管。

插件不是一个独立的服务。它通过你本地已经装好的 Codex CLI 和 app server https://t.co/v68I5UtdCD

多文件变更的审查可能比较慢，建议用 --background 后台运行

Review Gate 有额度消耗失控风险，需要人工监控

插件依赖本地 Codex CLI，不是云端服务，你的机器需要保持运行

详细介绍使用教程：https://t.co/EpnRPvZ0PA
插件安装：https://t.co/JoBdRVYARw

兄弟们 

这个有点意思，可以借鉴下

微软的 Copilot Researcher 上了一个多模型比稿功能：GPT 写稿，Claude 做评审，两个互挑毛病

让它们在同一个产品里各司其职

评审按来源可靠性、报告完整性、证据锚定三个维度打分，模仿学术同行评审。

Researcher 会同时调用 Anthropic 和 OpenAI https://t.co/zOoHJD1Hjn

同一天，微软还把 Copilot Cowork 推向了更广泛的可用范围。

Cowork 基于 Anthropic 的 Claude Cowork 技术，能在 Microsoft 365 应用内执行多步骤、长周期的任务，比如日程规划和每日简报。

详细介绍：https://t.co/W4FyLGUMXg

我现在使用Claude code的原则是

能不装skills就不装

装太多的skills会影响它运行效率，我的方法是：

吸收

看到好多技能我就让Claude Code 分析这个好技能里面和我们契合的点，直接吸收进来我们需要的部分，其他的全抛弃。🙂

这样你的系统只会越来越懂你越来越强，而不是越来越臃肿！ https://t.co/lvDkgcPEIA
